name: digarr
desc: AI-powered music discovery for your *arr stack. Recommends artists and individual albums through a 7-stage AI pipeline, scores and ranks them, and learns from …
descFull: AI-powered music discovery for your *arr stack. Recommends artists and individual albums through a 7-stage AI pipeline, scores and ranks them, and learns from your feedback -- approve a single album without grabbing the whole discography. Supports Lidarr, Spotify, Navidrome, Jellyfin, Plex. Self-hosted, open source.
